Package ui

Class SimulationGui

java.lang.Object
ui.SimulationGui
public final class SimulationGui extends Object
Professional Swing GUI for comparing N UAV intelligence strategies side-by-side.

Pass the number of strategies to the constructor — the layout, stat rows, footer results, and listener slots all scale automatically.

Layout (example: 2 passes, sync mode off)

 +--------------------------------------------------------------------+
 |  🚁  UAV Coverage — Strategy Comparison           [header]         |
 |  [field: 1500×1500]  [nodes: 50]  [range: 140]  [ticks: 5434]     |
 +----------------------------------+---------------------------------+
 |  PASS 1 LABEL                    |  PASS 2 LABEL                   |
 |  +----------------------------+  |  +---------------------------+  |
 |  |       SimPanel             |  |  |       SimPanel            |  |
 |  +----------------------------+  |  +---------------------------+  |
 |  Tick | Tokens | Mode | Coverage |  Tick | Tokens | Mode | Coverage|
 +----------------------------------+---------------------------------+
 |  Pass 1: X/100  ⎥  Pass 2: X/100  ⎥  ●Running  [Speed ←→] [⏸]   |
 |                  [New Run]                                          |
 +--------------------------------------------------------------------+

Threading model

All simulation passes run on separate background threads. Each pass calls its dedicated VisualizationListener, which posts Swing updates to the EDT via SwingUtilities.invokeLater(java.lang.Runnable).

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SimulationGui(int passCount)
    Convenience overload — no config summary, sync mode off.
    SimulationGui(int passCount, SimulationConfig config, boolean syncMode)
    Creates a GUI for passCount parallel strategy passes with a full configuration summary displayed in the header.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    VisualizationListener
    createListener(int panelIndex)
    Returns a VisualizationListener that feeds simulation snapshots into the panel at panelIndex.
    void
    notifyPassComplete(int pass, int tokens, int total, double coverage)
    Notifies the GUI that a pass has finished.
    void
    setNewRunAction(Runnable action)
    Registers an action that is invoked when the user clicks "New Run".
    void
    show()
    Makes the window visible (safe to call from any thread).

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • SimulationGui

      public SimulationGui(int passCount, SimulationConfig config, boolean syncMode)
      Creates a GUI for passCount parallel strategy passes with a full configuration summary displayed in the header.
      Parameters:
      passCount - number of intelligence strategies to display (≥ 1)
      config - active simulation configuration shown in the header
      syncMode - true shows a SYNC badge and adjusts labels
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if passCount < 1

    • SimulationGui

      public SimulationGui(int passCount)
      Convenience overload — no config summary, sync mode off. Equivalent to SimulationGui(passCount, SimulationConfig.defaults(), false).
      Parameters:
      passCount - number of intelligence strategies to display (≥ 1)

  • Method Details

    • show

      public void show()
      Makes the window visible (safe to call from any thread).

    • setNewRunAction

      public void setNewRunAction(Runnable action)
      Registers an action that is invoked when the user clicks "New Run". Called on the EDT. Set before calling show().
      Parameters:
      action - action to perform; pass null to clear

    • createListener

      public VisualizationListener createListener(int panelIndex)
      Returns a VisualizationListener that feeds simulation snapshots into the panel at panelIndex.
      Parameters:
      panelIndex - 0-based index; must be in range [0, passCount)
      Returns:
      listener that paces the simulation and posts updates to the EDT

    • notifyPassComplete

      public void notifyPassComplete(int pass, int tokens, int total, double coverage)
      Notifies the GUI that a pass has finished. Safe to call from any thread.
      Parameters:
      pass - 1-based pass index
      tokens - tokens collected
      total - total nodes
      coverage - coverage fraction [0,1] (NaN if not tracked)
